title: amaryllis × colvillii
intro: Amaryllis × colvillii, also known as the 'Apple Blossom' or 'Pink Charm', is a hybrid bulbous perennial plant that belongs to the Amaryllidaceae family. The plant contains alkaloids, which have been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antimicrobial activities. Consuming the plant or its extracts is said to provide various health benefits, such as reducing stress, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Amaryllis × colvillii is often used in combination with other herbs to create teas, tinctures, and capsules that are believed to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
